outputs: stt.v1 verbose_json response with optional per-segment `speaker` string cluster id (contracts/stt/v1)

boundaries: deferred (post-meeting) tier only; realtime stays on local Whisper
speaker labels are anonymous within-file clusters (max 15), never names or cross-session identity
no voiceprint/enrollment capability — cross-meeting identity is out of scope for this adapter
uploaded files and transcriptions are deleted from Soniox after transcript fetch (best effort)
audio leaves the deployment to the Soniox API; requires SONIOX_API_KEY to be intentionally configured
forbidden_claims: cluster ids are stable across meetings
diarization output is ground-truth speaker identity

checks: golden token payload folds byte-identically into golden response (unit test)
backends without diarization omit `speaker` (backward compatibility test)
